suggestionLog.match: האם אתה יכול לעבוד על עץ בינארי?
suggestionLog.replacement: האם אתה יכול לבלף עץ בינארי?
suggestionLog.reason: The subtitle 'Can you BS a Binary Tree?' is a play on words. 'לעבוד על' is okay but 'לבלף' captures the 'BS' nuance better in a casual technical context.
suggestionLog.note: Applied exact replacement to selected MDX.
